summary: Admin Portal Tab Navigation Bug Fix Verified - Tab navigation now works correctly after 10+ clicks. The fix (navigate('/portal/admin', { replace: true }) before setActiveTab) resolves the issue.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tab navigation bug is fixed. The fix ensures navigate('/portal/admin', { replace: true }) is called before setActiveTab(tab.id) on every tab click.

tab_navigation_after_10_clicks.description: Navigation zwischen allen Admin Portal Tabs muss nach 10+ Klicks funktionieren
tab_navigation_after_10_clicks.details: 14 different tab clicks tested, all successful. URL stays at /portal/admin

sub_route_return.description: Nach Besuch einer Sub-Route und Rückkehr muss Navigation noch funktionieren
sub_route_return.details: Clicked ID-Checks, then Dashboard - Dashboard content visible after return

url_consistency.description: Die URL muss /portal/admin bleiben beim Tab-Wechsel
url_consistency.details: All tab clicks maintained URL at https://bundle-inventory-pro.preview.emergentagent.com/portal/admin

view_changes_correctly.description: Klicken auf einen Tab muss die entsprechende Ansicht anzeigen
view_changes_correctly.details: Each tab click showed correct content - Dashboard stats, Tenants list, Devices table, Locations table, Settings sidebar, etc.

test_path: Admin Portal (admin@tsrid.com / admin123) -> Multiple tab navigation

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Die Tabs im Admin Portal reagieren nach einigen Klicks nicht mehr
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: All tab clicks now call navigate('/portal/admin', { replace: true }) before setActiveTab(tab.id)
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: FIXED - Tab navigation works correctly after 10+ clicks
